content:
Recently attended a webinar on "Medical Negligence in India: Civil, Criminal, and Consumer Law Dimensions" organized by Legiloom on 21st June 2026.
The session gave me valuable insights into civil liability, criminal accountability, and consumer protection remedies in the context of medical negligence — a truly enriching experience for me as a law student! ⚖️💡
Grateful to Dr. Adv. Malhar Parikh and Badal Kumar Sir for such an informative session! 🙏
